news.t: Raymond James Investment Management Launches Initial Suite of Active ETFs

overview.description: The RJ Eagle Vertical Income ETF (RJVI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Corporate index. The fund is an actively managed ETF seeking to maximize yield by investing in US companies at any level of their vertical capital structure, including corporate bonds, preferred and common stock. Positions are selected based on risk-adjusted yield RJVI was launched on Oct 2, 2025 and is issued by Raymond James.
